description: Create a documented foreground process in OpenLCA named 'Recycled HDPE Pellet Production' using the USLCI database (import from ~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip). The process must include at least one input (e.g., electricity) and one output (Recycled HDPE pellets). Populate the ISO 14044 documentation fields by creating and linking specific entities: Actor 'Maria Chen' (Lead LCA Analyst, m.chen@greenplastics.example.com) as Data Generator, Actor 'Prof. Robert Taylor' (Independent LCA Reviewer) as Reviewer, and Source 'HDPE Recycling Energy Study 2023' (Year: 2023) as the Publication. Export the process as a JSON-LD file to ~/LCA_Results/hdpe_process_export.zip.
